SELECT IPv6StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address) AS ip_num FROM test_ipv6;
SELECT ip_address, IPv6StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address) AS ip_num FROM test_ipv6 WHERE ip_num > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt32, ip_address String);
SELECT tj.id, tj.ip_address, IPv6StringToNumOrDefault(tj.ip_address) AS ip_num FROM test_join tj JOIN test_ipv6 ti ON tj.ip_address = ti.ip_address;
WITH (SELECT IPv6StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address) FROM test_ipv6) AS ip_nums SELECT SUM(ip_nums) AS total_ip_num;
SELECT ip, IF(IPv6StringToNumOrDefault(ip) = 0, 'Invalid IP', 'Valid IP') AS ip_status FROM test_nested;

SELECT ip_address, inner.ip_num FROM test_ipv6 INNER JOIN (SELECT ip_address, IPv6StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address) AS ip_num FROM test_ipv6) AS inner ON test_ipv6.ip_address = inner.ip_address WHERE inner.ip_num = 0;
